bad_prompt: Make the error message look obvious and red.
good_prompt: Set error text color to #FF4D4F, font-size to 12px, margin-top to 4px, line-height to 1.5, display block, and add an SVG warning icon 14x14px aligned center with the text.
delta: 1) Deleted vague words 'obvious' and 'red'. 2) Added hard constraints for hex color #FF4D4F, 12px font size, 4px margin, 1.5 line height, and 14px SVG icon.

bad_prompt: Make the headline typography feel premium and readable on mobile.
good_prompt: Set headline font-family to Inter, font-size to 32px at mobile breakpoint, line-height to 1.1, letter-spacing to -0.02em, text-align to center, and max-width to 300px.
delta: 1) Deleted vague words 'premium' and 'readable'. 2) Added hard constraints for 32px size, 1.1 line-height, -0.02em spacing, center alignment, and 300px max-width.
